title: WOS Custody Hook Append Input
description: JSON serialization of the WOS-owned authored-record surface crossing the Kernel `custodyHook` seam. This is a runtime artifact, not an authored WOS document type, so it intentionally has no `$wos*` marker. The root object is the four-field append input defined by WOS Custody Hook Encoding §1.3. The live seam carries raw dCBOR bytes in `record`; this schema models the JSON host representation used by fixtures, tests, and debug export, where those bytes are serialized as base64 text.

record.description: Base64-encoded dCBOR bytes of the authored WOS record. At the seam this field is raw dCBOR bytes; this schema models the JSON serialization used by fixtures and test harnesses.

TypeIdTail.description: Lowercase Crockford base32 encoding of a UUIDv7 payload, 26 characters.

TenantPrefix.description: Deployment tenant prefix segment of a WOS TypeID used to namespace case and record ids.

CaseTypeId.description: TypeID-structured case identifier with the reserved `case` family prefix. WOS passes this value as the case side of the custody append idempotency tuple so Trellis can detect duplicate semantic appends for the same case.

x-lm.intent: Stable case identity used as one half of the WOS-owned idempotency tuple

ReservedRecordTypeId.description: TypeID-structured authored-record identifier using one of the reserved WOS family prefixes.

VendorRecordTypeId.description: TypeID-structured authored-record identifier using a vendor-owned `x-{vendor}-{kind}` family prefix.

RecordTypeId.description: TypeID-structured authored-record identifier using either a reserved WOS family prefix or a vendor-owned family prefix.

x-lm.intent: Stable authored-record identity used as one half of the WOS-owned idempotency tuple

WosEventType.description: Outcome-neutral WOS event-type identifier in canonical `wos.<layer>.<recordKind>` form. This field names the authored record family crossing the custodyHook seam without encoding success, failure, or policy outcome.

x-lm.intent: Registered WOS-owned event family identifier for the authored record

IdempotencySource.description: The WOS-owned semantic idempotency input consumed by the Trellis binding after dCBOR encoding and domain separation. `eventType` is intentionally excluded.

canonical_event_hash.description: Lowercase hex rendering of the 32-byte Trellis canonical_event_hash returned to WOS when represented as JSON. WOS stores this value on accepted provenance so downstream exports can cite the exact anchored canonical event.

x-lm.intent: The first pinned Trellis return value WOS stores and cites downstream

CustodyAppendReceipt.description: Minimum WOS-facing receipt for a successful `custodyHook` append.
